how_work.title: How It Works
how_work.subtitle: Just 3 steps to get started
how_work.tip_pause: Hover over to pause • Click a step to explore

step1.title: Connect WhatsApp
step1.description: Scan the QR code to connect your WhatsApp Business account. Your account will be securely linked to our platform in seconds.

step2.title: Configure AI Agent
step2.description: Set up your AI agent with custom prompts, knowledge base, and automation rules. Tailor it to match your business needs.

step3.title: Automate Conversations
step3.description: Your AI agent is now live! It will automatically handle customer inquiries, qualify leads, and provide 24/7 support.
